groups.title: Coconut Beach Resort
groups.desc:
Questions 11-16
Choose the correct letter, A, B or C.

questions.title: Who are suitable for Coconut Beach Resort?
Which type of room does Anna prefer?
Why do the visitors like the rainforest exploration?

options.title: C
options.content: It is the most interesting activity.

questions.title: The Sound of the Birds is only opened on

groups.question_title: Which TWO facilities does the resort centre provide?
groups.desc:
Questions 17 and 18
Choose TWO letters, A-E.

groups.question_title: In the tour of visiting educational aboriginal tribe, visitors can
groups.desc:
Questions 19 and 20
Choose TWO letters, A-E.

transcript.en: Welcome to our radio program 'Travel with Me in Australia'.
I'm Anna, the presenter of the radio show.
In today's session, I will introduce a fantastic place to you - the Coconut Beach Resort, which was newly built and opened to the public several months ago.
I visited the resort last week and had a wonderful time there.
Now I will give some details.
First of all, who is the target group?
As it is a beach resort, it's not suitable for backpackers, of course.
With little houses alongside the beach, this resort is the best place to spend time with your beloved one.
I know several newlyweds booked cabins there to spend their honeymoon.
However, it isn't an ideal destination for families with several children because it may be beyond the budget.
About the accommodation, you can choose from different types of rooms, and the price differs a lot.
Take the bathing facilities, for example; I booked a room with a spa bath for the first two days, which is the most cost-effective one.
But for the three days left, I changed the room and lived in the one with a private pool.
It was my favourite; I have to say.
Every night I could relax in the pool, which is so personal and secluded.
And the third option is a room with a private beach, which I want to experience next time.
The resort has various facilities catering to the needs of different visitors.
There is a golf course, and if you want to play, you can either hire the equipment on the course or buy it in the golf shop.
If you're going to bring some snacks and drinks and relax in the open air, you can go to the picnic area, which was extended recently.
The good news is that a horse ranch was added to the resort, so you can try horse riding if interested.
You can also visit a range of attractions, like the farm, waterfall etc.
I went to the town on the first day to enjoy the local food and talk with the local people.
Then, the next day, I joined a tour group to the rainforest.
It was my first time seeing a rainforest, and I was struck by the thick vegetation and diverse species, so I recommend it to you.
If you like, you can even explore the rainforest.
Walking among the densely covered forest, you can find different species of plants and animals.
It is an exciting activity for both young and old, so all the people who have been there loved it.
Don't worry; you won't get lost, as a guide will lead you throughout the exploration.
The most popular attraction is called the Sound of the Birds.
It used to be open at weekends, but it was always crowded with people.
As a result, it has changed the schedule and put it on the last two days of the weekdays.
I think it will give visitors a better experience.
Besides the recreational facilities, I'd also like to introduce you to some other facilities in the resort centre that may be useful.
First, it offers a transfer service.
You don't have to rent a car or take a taxi when you arrive at the airport.
A bus will pick you up and take you directly to the resort.
It leaves every 24 minutes, and there is no extra charge.
For coffee lovers, there is a café in the centre, and it opens from 8 a.m. to 11 p.m.
If you want to reserve a guided tour of the attractions, go to the tour booking office, which is located next to the café.
However, the tourist shop is being refurbished and isn't open at the moment, so if you want to buy some souvenirs for your families or friends, maybe you have to go to the town.
The last thing I want to mention is there is an aboriginal tribe near the resort, and if you are interested, there is a visit every Wednesday.
Maybe some of you have learnt aboriginal history or aboriginal traditions at school, like traditional dancing and blanket weaving.
But this time, you can experience by yourselves, appreciating aboriginal rock painting and even talking to well-known painters.
What's more, a local herbalist will introduce you to the herbal treatment, which is commonly used in the aboriginal tribe.
It is an educational visit and I'm sure you will learn much about the Aboriginal tribe.
OK, that's all I want to introduce today.
If you want to know more exciting holiday resorts in Australia, please wait for our program next week.
Bye!

11.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 Coconut Beach Resort；提示词为 who、suitable。
题目解析：本题作为开篇第一题，定位难度不大。原文通过“First of all, who is the target group?”引出该题。随后听到 not suitable for backpackers，否定了 A 选项。之后听到“... this resort is the best place to ...”，符合题干的 suitable 这一信息，接着听到“... spend time with your beloved one.”，对应 B 选项 couples，因此 B 选项为正确答案。原文之后还提到“... it isn't an ideal destination for families with several children ...”，说明 C 选项也被否定。

12.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 room；提示词为 prefer。
题目解析：定位词在原文通过 accommodation 来体现，原文先提到 room with a spa bath 是最划算的（cost-effective），但并未表明是否喜欢，因此 A 选项可排除。接着提到 room with a private pool 是最喜欢的（my favourite），对应题干的 prefer，因此 C 选项为正确答案。原文虽提到 room with a private beach，但说的是希望以后能体验，不符合题干要求，因此 B 选项也可排除。

13.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 facility；提示词为 recently、built。
题目解析：定位词以复数的形式出现，定位难度不大。原文先提到 B 选项 golf shop，但并未提及 recently built 的信息，因此可先排除 B 选项。接着出现 A 选项 picnic area，但对应的信息是 extended recently，与题干的 built 相矛盾，因此 A 选项也可排除。最后原文提到 a horse ranch was added to the resort，符合题干要求，因此 C 选项为正确答案。

14.analysis:
听前预测：提示词为 impressed、most。
题目解析：定位信息不明显，上一题结束后，考生便可开始听取该题信息。原文先后提及 waterfall 和 town，但都对应不上题干的 impressed ... most。接着出现 rainforest，原文提到“It was my first time seeing a rainforest, and I was struck by ...”，其中 be struck by 意为“被……打动”，此处表示给女士留下了深刻的印象，对应题干的 impressed ... most，因此 B 选项为正确答案。

15.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 rainforest exploration；提示词为 why、visitors、like。
题目解析：定位词在原文通过 explore the rainforest 来体现，原文提到“It is an exciting activity for both young and old, so all the people who have been there loved it.”，其中 both young and old 对应 A 选项的 all ages；who have been there 替换了题干的 visitors；love 替换了 like，信息都能对应上，因此 A 选项为正确答案。原文虽然说这个活动 exciting，但并未提及其 most interesting，因此 C 选项可排除。原文虽提到 a guide will lead you，但并未提及 excellent for guiding，因此 B 选项也可排除。B、C 选项都属于过度推断，这是干扰项的典型特点。

16.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 Sound of the Birds；提示词为 is、only、open。
题目解析：定位词原词重现。原文先提到“It used to be open at weekends ...”，其中 used to 表示“曾经”，与题干的时态相矛盾，因此 C 选项可排除。随后原文提到“... it has changed the schedule and put it on the last two days of the weekdays.”，其中 the last two days of the weekdays 对应 B 选项的信息，因此 B 选项为正确答案。A 选项在原文未提及。

17.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 facilities、resort centre；提示词为 does、provide。
题目解析：本题定位不难，定位词 facilities 和 resort centre 都原词重现。原文先提到 transfer service, “A bus will pick you up ... there is no extra charge.”，对应 B 选项 free bus transfer，因此 B 选项为第一个正确答案，并且可判断 D 选项 car transfer 错误。接着原文提到 café，但原文说的开放时间为 8 a.m. to 11 p.m.，不符合 A 选项的 24-hour，因此 A 选项可排除。随后出现“If you want to reserve a guided tour of the attractions, go to the tour booking office ...”，可判断 E 选项为第二个正确答案。最后原文提到 the tourist shop is being refurbished and isn't open at the moment，可判断 C 选项不符合题干要求。

18.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 facilities、resort centre；提示词为 does、provide。
题目解析：本题定位不难，定位词 facilities 和 resort centre 都原词重现。原文先提到 transfer service, “A bus will pick you up ... there is no extra charge.”，对应 B 选项 free bus transfer，因此 B 选项为第一个正确答案，并且可判断 D 选项 car transfer 错误。接着原文提到 café，但原文说的开放时间为 8 a.m. to 11 p.m.，不符合 A 选项的 24-hour，因此 A 选项可排除。随后出现“If you want to reserve a guided tour of the attractions, go to the tour booking office ...”，可判断 E 选项为第二个正确答案。最后原文提到 the tourist shop is being refurbished and isn't open at the moment，可判断 C 选项不符合题干要求。

19.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 aboriginal tribe；提示词为 visitors。
题目解析：定位词原词重现。原文先提到“Maybe some of you have learnt aboriginal history or aboriginal traditions at school, like traditional dancing and blanket weaving.”，说明土著历史或土著传统，包括传统舞蹈和毛毯编织，游客可能是在学校学到的，而并非亲自体验的，因此 A、B、D 三个选项都不符合题干要求，均可排除。接着原文提到“But this time, you can experience by yourselves, appreciating aboriginal rock painting and even talking to well-known painters.”，其中 talking to well-known painters 对应 C 选项 meet the artists，因此 C 选项为其中一个正确答案。之后 what's more 引出另一个答案句“... a local herbalist will introduce you to the herbal treatment ...”，其中 herbalist 意为“草药医生”，herbal treatment 意为“草药治疗”，对应 E 选项的 medicines，因此 E 选项为另一个正确答案。

20.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 aboriginal tribe；提示词为 visitors。
题目解析：定位词原词重现。原文先提到“Maybe some of you have learnt aboriginal history or aboriginal traditions at school, like traditional dancing and blanket weaving.”，说明土著历史或土著传统，包括传统舞蹈和毛毯编织，游客可能是在学校学到的，而并非亲自体验的，因此 A、B、D 三个选项都不符合题干要求，均可排除。接着原文提到“But this time, you can experience by yourselves, appreciating aboriginal rock painting and even talking to well-known painters.”，其中 talking to well-known painters 对应 C 选项 meet the artists，因此 C 选项为其中一个正确答案。之后 what's more 引出另一个答案句“... a local herbalist will introduce you to the herbal treatment ...”，其中 herbalist 意为“草药医生”，herbal treatment 意为“草药治疗”，对应 E 选项的 medicines，因此 E 选项为另一个正确答案。
